author: firstsun-dev
description: Selectively sync individual notes with GitLab or GitHub. Push, pull, diff, and resolve conflicts — file by file, on mobile and desktop. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: ClaudiaFang
manifest.description: Selectively sync individual notes with GitLab or GitHub. Push, pull, diff, and resolve conflicts — file by file, on mobile and desktop.
manifest.name: Git File Sync

name: Git File Sync

## 1.0.0 (2026-04-25)

### Features

* add rootPath setting and test connection button ([c7ba14c](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/c7ba14cb9ed4c2e915e344ad8df768dd9858180c))
* **core,ui,ci,docs:** add GitHub support, sync status view, batch operations, and CI/CD workflows ([#1](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/issues/1)) ([d553943](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/d5539434dc04cbc03edb11194a70d7c06213d118))
* implement rootPath setting and Test connection button ([cccf096](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/cccf096103496ffb0ebad35de13f43010c97d181))
* initial release ([f7a7e95](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/f7a7e95459af83380fecf9e07a0898862d440f62))
* initial release ([0107749](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/0107749d710bd6332f36b28b940f2c950b8cd734))
* integrate SyncConflictModal into SyncManager ([362def7](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/362def7cd380e7907c8d7575cc042b1fb232b5b3))
* Support .gitignore filtering and GitHub-style diff viewer ([cbc55d5](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/cbc55d502dad099e7c93d170ac533d1550f86c1c))
* **sync:** improve error reporting and file existence check ([b4bc25a](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/b4bc25a91ca858f37167b1392fa7ea84d916ed8d))

### Bug Fixes

* **build:** resolve dependencies, fix Vitest 4 mocking, and handle file existence ([6161bd7](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/6161bd75cd96ff6cb194347f0de6e91341724fc6))
* **ci:** update all workflows to use Node.js 20 ([28913a6](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/28913a629704576ea3f6a0388ece6d7b1268812b))
* **ci:** update all workflows to use Node.js 22 ([bbdda32](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/bbdda32d00f1f218cfa40ac5c5fa56de437894d1))
* **deps:** update esbuild to 0.28.0 to satisfy vite peer dependency ([29f55a1](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/29f55a14eceac5f0235d580a480ec5bd5e8b230d))
* enable automatic versioning and sync manifest to 1.1.0 ([a27d3fd](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/a27d3fdba5597b390feb9f51d9c5083ad5c41320))
* ensure type-safe mocks in sync-manager.test.ts and resolve lint errors ([a6104d9](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/a6104d991c8772db828f77540ef646a6e53cf93b))
* gitignore support for subfolder vaults and resolve lint warnings ([fb9b22a](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/fb9b22a9e13344a957a5969edcd895f3062cda6f))
* **gitlab:** add Project ID encoding and enhanced diagnostics ([8893396](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/8893396bff96586a993b550cc5b64ad7fe788c32))
* **gitlab:** encode projectId and improve error diagnostics ([ce07e0b](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/ce07e0b18d2f9c6c5037dc5220aefe40b5046666))
* **release:** add conventional-changelog-conventionalcommits dependency ([423ca41](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/423ca4165a20afd9ffb7fd8a695d40877ca5a0a6))
* **release:** remove git plugin to avoid branch protection conflicts ([6f1925a](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/6f1925af446ac1306656e29f896117d76b96931f))
* remove 'v' prefix from tags for Obsidian compatibility ([b0f94ca](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/b0f94ca480a6841246380c2ca4c9ecbb1b4b31f0))
* resolve obsidian community guidelines and lint errors ([ecd2aab](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/ecd2aabfca7c152a5cce880c551e601c5907186a))
* resolve obsidian community guidelines and lint errors ([#7](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/issues/7)) ([7bef2ca](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/7bef2ca0d772362424d6521442cb62f35bd14547))
* synchronize manifest version with git tag and assets ([004acab](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/004acab1d5e25ba06edaf5d42cd17e4e80ded004))
* **sync:** implement robust sync diagnostics with proper TS types ([b354f65](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/b354f651cf90fe068acebb7f597732f38d9413a3))
* **test:** add @vitest/coverage-v8 dependency ([c59ad0a](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/c59ad0a5ec167e54999bfd59c6a1d9c0b71a246f))
* trigger release to publish updated manifest ([fc94914](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/fc94914bfe467262f9bfaafab60b06979c537b40))

### Performance Improvements

* **sync:** optimize GitLab push by avoiding redundant getFile calls ([c2a6bb5](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/c2a6bb5fba9c54dfb086dcb9d9cf826b72f46645))

### Documentation

* add UI screenshots and correct diff view background color ([8c571e6](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/8c571e6a8cf3a805bb405977fa97f15c4c18758a))
* overhaul README and add Traditional Chinese usage guide ([cab60ad](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/cab60ad9faeb403e4a119ca2d41e8db4d97ea181))
* update CLAUDE.md with test command and cost optimization rules ([8ea6edf](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/8ea6edf51e9b0e4c7694c2971facec154eca399a))
* update guide and remove garbage ([cb1539b](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/cb1539bd468874ec0085884bf407c9bd3d5166cd))

### Code Refactoring

* **ci:** simplify workflows - feature vs production branches ([e298ec1](https://github.com/firstsun-dev/git-files-sync/commit/e298ec130aed8486b5f223a3f6d46ac6995625e2))
